Alluring Horn  
 

Lore Item No Trade Quest Item Placeable
Slot: PRIMARY SECONDARY
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
Focus: Brass Resonance 9
WT: 1.0 Size: MEDIUM
Class: ALL
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)
Alluring Horn
Lore Item No Trade Quest Item Placeable
Slot: PRIMARY SECONDARY
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
Focus: Brass Resonance 9
WT: 1.0 Size: MEDIUM
Class: ALL
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)

Item Lore:Vedico's Alluring Horn
Item Type:Brass Instrument
Stackable:No
Submitted By:Shaguar
Lucy Entry By:Tiana
Item Updated By:SwiftyMUSE
Source:Live
IC Last Updated:2021-12-19 03:37:44
Page Updated:Fri Feb 11th, 2022

Expansion: Ruins of Kunark
Rarity: Common
Level to Attain: 40
[Drops | Quests | Comments ]

Drops

This item is found on creatures.

Ocean of Tears
NPC Name
Quag Maelstrom

Quests

This item is used in quests.
Expansion List - Premium only.

Dreadlands
Quest Name
Bard Epic: Singing Short Sword

Zone(s) Found In:


Zone Name
Ocean of Tears


Uploaded April 10th, 2020 by iventheassassin
Send a correction
Post Comment
MQable on free trade servers
QuoteReply
# Feb 03 2022 at 3:18 AM Rating: Decent
EvilpantsMangler
6 posts
Looted the horn while camping the Tainted Cyclops for druid epic. The Horn is no trade, but the letter you get for turning it in to Vedico was tradeable on Mischief (free trade/random loot server).
▲ Page top
Alluring Horn
QuoteReply
# Jul 20 2015 at 3:04 PM Rating: Decent
ghengisjon
View User Forum
Scholar
228 posts
If the horn you loot from Quag Maelstrom has a charge on it you will have to use that charge before you turn it in to Forpar or he won't take it. Had the backbone in my inventory for 3 weeks before I figured this out.
▲ Page top

Loc is approx 1620 -2675 on beach. Tainted and Corrupted spawn here as well.

# Aug 05 2008 at 11:35 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1719792980275
346 posts
He spawned near 1580, -2480 for me, on the shore west of the druid ring, after killing all the seafury cyclops on the beach west of the druid ring and in the valley to the north of the druid ring for about an hour.

mana
QuoteReply
# Aug 12 2004 at 9:50 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591798087528
27 posts
If you have any casters in your party when you go after him have them stand back cuz he will suck your mana dry in a matter of seconds it seems like. If they stay out of melee range he doesn't seem to do it nearly as bad.
▲ Page top
Equipped it

# Sep 04 2003 at 6:14 AM Rating: Decent

19 posts

▲ Page top
ALL/ALL?????
QuoteReply
# Jul 09 2003 at 12:21 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591790179682
23 posts
Well, I was in OoT last night and seen this named cyclops and thought "hmmmm...why not." I didnt expect to loose all my mana but I was able to take him out using my "Drone arms."

Anyway to get to the point.....I looted this horn and mine says All/All and secondary for slot. Now I was not able to equip it, however I am a 53Druid and would have no need for it. But does anyone know if I would be able to turn it in to the BB prt authority for exp or a different item?
▲ Page top
npcs name
QuoteReply
# Nov 08 2001 at 11:08 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591750062575
56 posts
Vedico Windwhisper is inside of the big whit house upon the middle dock ask her what shoddy service
▲ Page top
Hrm.
QuoteReply
# Jun 12 2001 at 7:58 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591758130200
60 posts
A bard in the port Authority in BB is asking about this horn. Try giving it to her.
▲ Page top
RE: Hrm.
QuoteReply
# Jul 16 2001 at 5:59 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592248322158
282 posts
Yes, it does indeed go to her. Her boat was picked up by Quag, & he took her horn, saying he would play pretty music w/ it. All part of the bard epic quest for the Singing Short Sword.
▲ Page top
percentage?
QuoteReply
# Jun 10 2001 at 9:07 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591750976102
281 posts
does this horn actualy add a negative % to brass songs?
▲ Page top
RE: percentage?
QuoteReply
# Jul 16 2001 at 6:03 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592248322158
282 posts
Yes and no. The percentages that people give for instruments are usually using storebaught instruments as the base (so an unfinished brass trumpet from a merchant would be 0%). This doesn't mean that instruments from merchants don't effect songs, nor does it mean that this instrument makes songs less effective. It simply means that this instrument effects songs 0.99% less than a brass instrument from a merchant. It makes songs better... just not much better. I definitely prefer my new Conch Shell Horn. =)
▲ Page top
Alluring Horn

The one I looted yesterday was given as All/All. Didn't try to use it though.
